200.description: AI SDK v5 UI-message stream (SSE) replaying the active run

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Keyword to match against chat titles and message content.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of matching chats to return.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of latest messages to return.

parameters.name: beforeSeq
parameters.description: Return messages strictly before this sequence number.

400.description: Malformed chat id or invalid history pagination query

404.description: Chat not found or not owned

400.description: Malformed chat id or invalid message body

402.description: No model credential configured for the user

404.description: Chat not found or not owned

200.description: AI SDK v5 UI-message stream (SSE) of the regenerated run

402.description: No model credential configured for the user

404.description: No turn to regenerate (or chat not owned)

409.description: The last turn has no completed response to regenerate

404.description: Run not found or not owned
Run not found or not owned

parameters.name: after_sequence
parameters.description: Replay strictly after this event sequence (the SSE `id:` of the last event seen).

200.description: Server-sent events; each frame: id = event sequence, data = {sequence, eventType, payload, createdAt}

404.description: Run not found or not owned

409.description: At the per-user memory cap, or a duplicate of existing content

404.description: Chat not found or not owned
Todo not found in this chat
Todo not found in this chat
Chat not found or not public

409.description: Duplicate name, or at the per-user prompt cap
Rename collides with an existing prompt

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Window in days; the whole view is scoped to it (UTC).

400.description: Invalid body, or BYOK disabled (no CREDENTIAL_MASTER_KEYS)

404.description: Unknown or cross-tenant chat (no existence leak)

token.description: Opaque bearer token. Stored server-side only as a SHA-256 hash.

snippet.description: Excerpt from the first matching user/assistant message; null for a title-only match.

uptoSeq.description: Messages with seq <= this were summarized for model context.

visibility.description: Sharing: 'public' exposes a read-only link at /shared/:id; 'private' revokes it.

source.description: Who created it: 'user' (typed in the management UI, auto-injected into chats) or 'agent' (saved by the assistant, recall-only).
'user' (added in the panel) or 'agent' (the assistant's plan).

costUsd.description: Estimated USD (built-in price table), known turns only.

label.description: Human label for the chat selector

providerAccountId.description: Owning provider account; null for the instance-env model

scopeId.description: Null for the env-derived instance layer

version.description: Config row version consumed; 0 = no row (defaults)

scopeId.description: Null for the env-derived instance layer

version.description: Config row version consumed; 0 = no row (defaults)

provenance.description: Which scope set each effective leaf value

layers.description: Every layer consulted, in inheritance order

instructions.description: The user's current custom instructions ('' if none set).

The user's custom instructions — free text that shapes the assistant's tone/style across their chats. Non-authoritative: cannot override safety, tool-permission, or tenancy rules. Empty string clears it.
